title: Research Perna Output
description: Schema-strict output for research perna agents (codex-xhigh-researcher and future migrated pernas). Mirrors codex-xhigh-researcher.md Phase 0 spec. Versioned: bump schema_version on breaking change. Evidence anchor: KBP-36.

schema_version.description: Schema version pin. Bump on breaking change. Consumers SHOULD validate this matches expected.

research_question_id.description: Identifier (e.g., R1, R2, R11, or topic-slug)

external_brain_used.description: External brain identifier (e.g., 'codex-cli + gpt-5.5 + xhigh'). Null if preflight failed.

codex_cli_version.description: Codex CLI version string (e.g., '0.125.0'). Null if preflight failed.

findings.description: Factual claims derived from external brain output. Empty array allowed if confidence_overall='low' + gap explicit.

claim.description: Factual claim derived from external brain output

verified.description: True = verified externally (e.g., NCBI esummary returned record). False = perna claim only.

convergence_signal.description: Alignment with expected literature, divergence flag, or novel finding indicator

candidate_pmids_unverified.description: PMIDs claimed by external brain but NOT yet verified via NCBI E-utilities. POC enforcement: spot-check ≥2 minimum.

items.description: Numeric PMID. Pattern catches fabricated alphanumeric values.

type.description: alignment=converges with other pernas | divergence=disagrees | gap=missing answer

confidence_overall.description: Aggregate confidence. Low if preflight failed OR fabrication rate >10%.

gaps.description: What the external brain could NOT answer. Empty array allowed only if all queries answered.
